subject: [PATCH 06/32] fuse: move background queuing related members to fuse_chan

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Raised a minor concern about an outdated comment in the patch, suggesting it be updated to remove 'congestion_threshold' from the list since it's accessed locklessly.

2026-04-22.patch_summary: Move background queuing related members to fuse_chan, addressing a potential double-put bug in fuse_try_move_page() by adding an extra folio_get() before replace_page_cache_folio().

reviews.author: Miklos Szeredi
reviews.summary: Agreed with the suggested update and fixed the comment.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, 22 Apr 2026 at 19:54, Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com> wrote:

> > +       /** Protects: max_background, congestion_threshold, num_background,
>
> nit: should this comment be updated to remove "congestion_threshold"
> from the list? congestion threshold is accessed locklessly.

Agreed, fixed.

Thanks,
Miklos

2026-04-23.patch_summary: Move background queuing related members to fuse_chan, addressing a potential double-put bug in fuse_try_move_page() by adding an extra folio_get() before replace_page_cache_folio().
